answer: Across Phase I studies for CMP-8821, the most frequently reported adverse events were nausea (32%), headache (24%), and elevated ALT (18%). One dose-limiting toxicity (Grade 3 hepatotoxicity) was observed in cohort 3 at 120 mg; the event resolved after dose interruption.

citations.title: XYZ-2023 interim safety report
citations.excerpt: Treatment-emergent adverse events: nausea 32%, headache 24%, ALT elevation 18%. One DLT (Grade 3 hepatotoxicity) in cohort 3 at 120 mg.

citations.title: XYZ-2023 Clinical Protocol v1.4
citations.excerpt: Safety stopping rules and DLT definition for dose escalation cohorts 1–4.

lineageSummary: Safety profile synthesized from Vector DB-indexed XYZ-2023 safety report and linked Phase I study summaries for CMP-8821.
